article_title: B.C. Reg. 201/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission

briefs.title: BC Securities Commission updates filing fees and adds new prospectus category for capital markets filers
briefs.summary: The BC Securities Commission amended its system fee rules, updating how filing fees are calculated by reference period and adding a new document category called a 'WKSI base shelf prospectus' (a streamlined fundraising document for well-known large issuers).
briefs.action_required: Check if your business files documents through SEDAR+ and review the updated fee schedule for your filing type.

key_dates.label: Updated BC Securities Commission system fee rules take effect
BC Securities Commission fee reference period begins — Appendix A dealer/adviser filers

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 201/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission
